channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ottawa River floodwaters expected to peak mid-week as Quebec and Ontario communities respond
item.description: The Ottawa River is forecast to reach its peak flood levels by the middle of the week in the Ottawa–Gatineau region, according to updated projections from the Ottawa River Regulation Planning Board. W...

item.title: South C Residents Demand Accountability After Deadly Nairobi Building Collapse
item.description: Operations at Ardhi House in Nairobi were briefly disrupted after residents from the South C area staged protests demanding government action following a fatal building collapse earlier this year. The...

item.title: Growing Concerns Over Vulnerability of Nuclear Facilities to Modern Warfare Tactics
item.description: The article argues that modern warfare is shifting away from traditional nuclear weapons toward targeting existing nuclear facilities using cheaper technologies such as drones, missiles, and cyberatta...

item.title: DPWH starts dismantling incomplete Quezon City pumping station linked to flooding
item.description: Nagsimula na ang Department of Public Works and Highways (DPWH) sa pagtanggal ng isang hindi natapos na pumping station sa Barangay Talayan, Quezon City, matapos itong maiugnay sa lumalalang pagbaha s...

item.title: Keir Starmer under pressure over Peter Mandelson appointment and alleged vetting failures
item.description: Keir Starmer has come under intense political pressure following revelations surrounding his decision to appoint Peter Mandelson as UK ambassador to the United States. During a heated session in the H...

item.title: Alberta Premier criticises federal 30x30 conservation plan over wildfire management concerns
item.description: Alberta Premier Danielle Smith has publicly criticised the federal government’s newly announced conservation strategy aimed at aligning Canada with the United Nations’ “30x30” target, which seeks to p...

item.title: Pakistan warns of economic slowdown amid Middle East conflict, oil shocks and budget cuts
item.description: The Government of Pakistan has cautioned that the country’s economic growth will slow down during the current and next fiscal years due to the ongoing conflict in the Middle East, rising global oil pr...

item.title: Singer D4vd charged over death of teenage girl found in abandoned Tesla in Los Angeles
item.description: US singer D4vd, whose real name is David Burke, has been formally charged with first-degree murder in connection with the death of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez, whose body was discovered in a T...

item.title: HEC restricts establishment of new universities and sub-campuses without prior approval
item.description: The Higher Education Commission (HEC) of Pakistan has introduced a strict regulatory policy regarding the establishment of new universities and sub-campuses across the country, particularly at the teh...

item.title: Ekurhuleni officials face court over fraud and corruption allegations
item.description: Suspended Ekurhuleni metro police deputy chief Julius Mkhwanazi and Ekurhuleni city manager Kagiso Lerutla have appeared in the Boksburg magistrate’s court facing serious allegations of fraud, corrupt...

item.title: Singer D4vd faces murder charges in death of missing teenage girl found in abandoned vehicle
item.description: Los Angeles prosecutors have charged 21-year-old singer D4vd, whose legal name is David Burke, with the murder of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez, whose remains were discovered in a decomposed and...

item.title: Bail hearing for suspended EMPD deputy chief Julius Mkhwanazi and co-accused scheduled for Thursday amid fraud and corruption charges
item.description: Suspended Ekurhuleni Metropolitan Police Department (EMPD) deputy chief Julius Mkhwanazi is set to appear in court for a bail application hearing on Thursday following his arrest over the weekend. Mkh...

item.title: Pakistan to Host US-Iran Negotiations Amidst Rising Tensions
item.description: Former US President Donald Trump announced that US representatives will be traveling to Islamabad, Pakistan, to engage in negotiations with Iran. This unexpected development comes amid escalating tens...

item.title: CCTV evidence reveals movements of suspect in Kampala daycare baby murder case
item.description: CCTV footage presented in court has shed light on the movements of Christopher Okello Onyio, a suspect accused of killing four babies at Ggaba Kindergarten in Kampala, Uganda. The tragic incident, whi...

item.title: M M Joshi urges greater promotion of Sanskrit, says India should aspire to regain 'vishwaguru' status
item.description: BJP veteran and former Union minister Murli Manohar Joshi has called for a stronger push towards promoting Sanskrit in India, including its potential use in modern scientific fields such as quantum co...

item.title: Allbirds’ Shift Toward AI Sparks Debate Over Familiar Tech Bubble Patterns
item.description: The article discusses the unusual strategic pivot by Allbirds, the San Francisco-based footwear company known for its eco-friendly wool running shoes, as it moves into artificial intelligence computin...

item.title: Louisiana Shooting: Eight Children Among Those Killed
item.description: A devastating mass shooting in Hammond, Louisiana, has claimed the lives of eight children and several adults, according to authorities. The incident occurred at a Dollar General store where a communi...

item.title: Brampton man charged in London following human trafficking investigation
item.description: A Brampton man is facing multiple charges after an investigation into alleged human trafficking in London, Ontario. According to the report, police launched a probe into suspected human trafficking ac...

item.title: ANC launches national recruitment drive for mayoral candidates to strengthen metro governance ahead of local elections
item.description: The African National Congress (ANC) has announced a nationwide initiative to identify and recruit capable mayoral candidates as part of its strategy to improve governance and regain control of key met...

item.title: MOI and Weill Cornell train over 150 health workers on spinal treatment in Dar es Salaam
item.description: The Muhimbili Orthopedic and Brain Institute (MOI), in partnership with Weill Cornell Medicine from the United States, has launched a three-day specialised training programme on spinal treatment for m...
